title: Blackholes Optimization
description: Pc and mobile fabric fps boost and optimization mod pack.
body:
Pc and mobile fps boost and optimization modpack. 100fps to 300fps. Use 2.5gb vram this this modpack.

Blackholes Optimization Modpack is dedicated to ultimate Minecraft optimization, delivering a higher FPS boost than standard optimization modpacks!

This modpack supports most Minecraft versions and is compatible with: Fabric loader

‌Within this modpack, you'll only find handpicked optimization mods. For each version, the author strives to maximize performance by selecting the best possible solutions.

If you're a player with lower-end hardware or want to test your device's maximum frame rates, and you're looking for an optimal set of optimization mods without any extras, this modpack perfectly fits your needs!

The author can confidently claim that this modpack offers better results than the vast majority of current optimization modpacks, as others more or less include unnecessary mods that consume performance.
